title: work orders parallel lanes
purpose: C3.2 defines work orders parallel lanes for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery.
scope: Owns `C3.2` only; siblings under `C3` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §5 — Branch C — Product execution plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#5-branch-c-product-execution-plane).
behavior_steps: When any child catalog INDEX changes—scripts, playbooks, skills, facts, pipelines, or pack README entries—[B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) S0 regeneration rebuilds `docs/platform/CATALOG.md` so the umbrella stays the single merged discovery surface before the next pursuit wake.

At compose-first preflight per [B4.3](B4.3-compose-first-catalog-before-improvise.md), conductors and librarians query the umbrella before deep tree walks; [E2.2](E2.2-compose-query-catalog-list-components.md) list-components runs against CATALOG.md and child INDEX manifests to return candidate paths, maturity tier, and component type.

The umbrella satisfies E1's single discovery surface goal: pack README fragments from [E1.6](E1.6-catalog-template-packs-readme.md) appear alongside platform catalogs so role binding and compose ranking share one entry point.

Bidirectional cross-links to child INDEX files must hold; when [E5.1](E5.1-staleness-design-graph-staleness-json.md) marks catalog nodes stale, platform maturity claims in Plane D block promotion-done until umbrella completeness and staleness graph coverage reconcile.

If CATALOG.md is missing, out of date with child INDEX rows, or compose returns empty without [E2.5](E2.5-compose-miss-l0-enqueue-promotion.md) promotion enqueue, pursuit stops at H2—never improvise catalog paths from conductor chat.

Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `C3.2`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Map `C3.2` to v2.14â€“v2.23 release row in SEC-15-index.md.
Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_c3_2.py when script exists.
Validate `C3.2` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `C3.2` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `C3.2`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: C3.2 defines work orders parallel lanes for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery. In practice, the system when any child catalog index changes—scripts, playbooks, skills, facts, pipelines, or pack readme entries—[b1.1](b1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) s0 regeneration rebuilds `docs/platform/catalog.md` so the umbrella stays the single merged discovery surface before the next pursuit wake, then at compose-first preflight per [b4.3](b4.3-compose-first-catalog-before-improvise.md), conductors and librarians query the umbrella before deep tree walks; [e2.2](e2.2-compose-query-catalog-list-components.md) list-components runs against catalog.md and child index manifests to return candidate paths, maturity tier, and component type.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-c 2026-06-28 -->

Work orders group task cards for parallel lanes under program mode: lane json, leases, and manifest dependencies prevent two workers editing the same journal writer or conflicting branches.

Orchestrate-program spawns only when manifest gate cleared and spawn_policy allows. Single-stream greenfield uses sequential cards without work orders unless user enables program features.
